name: 角与多边形
subject: math
domain_name: 几何与三角 / Geometry & Trig / Geometry & Trig
curriculum_points: Candidates should have a scientific calculator for Paper 3 and Paper 4. Calculators are not allowed for Paper 1 and Paper 2.

C1.14 Using a calculator
1 Use a calculator efficiently.
2 Enter values appropriately on a calculator.
3 Interpret the calculator display appropriately.

E1.14 Using a calculator
1 Use a calculator efficiently.
2 Enter values appropriately on a calculator.
3 Interpret the calculator display appropriately.

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「角与多边形」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Candidates should have a scientific calculator for Paper 3 and Paper 4. Calculators are not allowed for Paper 1 and Pape…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。
